_note: Generic 4-step follow-up sequence (Phase 4). English-only (the pipeline pitches every region in English). Selected by step kind: nudge -> issue -> check -> breakup. Placeholders {greeting} and {company} are filled at send time; NO sign-off in the body (outreach.py appends the signature). Low-friction, non-spammy copy — no 'floating/bumping/checking in'.

en.nudge:
{greeting}

Just following up on my last note. We've noticed that for businesses like {company}, simply cleaning up the mobile version of a website so it's incredibly easy to use is the best way to stop losing customers to competitors. I have a quick, one-sentence suggestion on how to make your site a bit easier for your mobile visitors. If that would be useful, grab 10 minutes on my calendar whenever suits you:
